programme.title: Off Air
programme.desc: Off Air

programme.title: The Tonight Show
programme.desc: Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Matron hits the roof when she discovers what Susie has been up to. Dr Burnett wrestles with a dilemma on two fronts.

programme.title: Sport Stories: Paul McGrath
programme.desc: One of Ireland’s greatest ever footballers opens up in a powerful in-depth interview about his life and a career from St. Pat’s to Man United, racism and Jack Charlton.

programme.title: Don't Look Back In Anger
programme.desc: In a series of 20 half hours, we chronicle the news and highlights of the last 20 years in this archive and music-based series.

programme.title: Don't Look Back In Anger
programme.desc: In a series of 20 half hours, we chronicle the news and highlights of the last 20 years in this archive and music-based series.

programme.title: Cash Trapped
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents the big money quiz based on his own idea which features six players who cannot leave the contest until somebody wins....

programme.title: Sport Stories: Damien Delaney
programme.desc: After breaking into the Premier League as a 19-year-old, it took Damien Delaney 11 years to make it back to the top. The former Crystal Palace defender opens up on his journey.

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: With exclusive access, Paul O’Grady follows life at Battersea Dogs and Cats Home, as dedicated staff care for animals in need sharing heartbreaking stories and warm happy endings.

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: With exclusive access, Paul O’Grady follows life at Battersea Dogs and Cats Home, as dedicated staff care for animals in need sharing heartbreaking stories and warm happy endings.

programme.title: The Six O'Clock Show
programme.desc: A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country’s top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Jason Manford hosts the general knowledge quiz show in which the four contestants can always give an answer - but can they give an unbeatable answer?

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton.

programme.title: Who's Doing The Dishes
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger puts on a dinner party as she plays mystery host to four strangers, who have to work out the former Towie star's identity with the help of a few cryptic clues.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: When a sea monster washes up on an English beach, Jeremy Wade sets off to unmask the beast. His journey will take him to the ice sheets of Greenland and the fjords of Norway.

programme.title: Ant & Dec's Limitless Win
programme.desc: Join Ant and Dec as the guide contestants through answering questions in a bid to win as much money as they can, with no limit to the amount of money they can have in the pot.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A daughter is outraged when her mother calls authorities for a welfare check on her four children. Meanwhile, a woman claims her ex-friend did not fulfil a land contract agreement.

programme.title: Living With Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Kennedy heads off to share space, life and conversation with celebrities in their own homes.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island UK returns for a twelfth series, offering the ultimate summer of fun, romance and drama.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more.

programme.desc: Off Air

programme.title: The Tonight Show
programme.desc: Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Susie’s quick thinking saves the day when Matron reaches her lowest ebb. Weatherill gets to the bottom of a would-be priest’s problem - but how can she break the bad news?

programme.title: Sport Stories: Paul McGrath
programme.desc: Paul McGrath played at three major tournaments throughout Ireland’s golden era. He relives a club and international career and his battles on and off the field.

programme.desc: In a series of 20 half hours, we chronicle the news and highlights of the last 20 years in this archive and music-based series.

programme.title: Sport Stories: Kenneth Egan
programme.desc: From Clondalkin to Beijing. Olympic silver medallist Kenny Egan’s journey to the top of the amateur boxing world and his hidden struggles with addiction

programme.desc: With exclusive access, Paul O’Grady follows the ups and downs of life at Battersea Dogs and Cats Home as its dedicated staff care for our four-legged friends in need.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a case in Nepal that sounds strangely familiar - a lone fisherman dragged off his feet and into a mountain river by an unseen creature.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man rescues his disabled mother while her daughter reportedly refuses to repay a loan; a man proud of his educated daughter is sued after her wages are garnished for his mistake.

programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit the families they have help reunite and discover what happened after their emotional reunion.

programme.title: Cracker
programme.desc: Detective drama strand starring Robbie Coltrane as the wise-cracking Fitz, a brilliant but flawed criminal psychologist with a remarkable insight into the criminal mind.

programme.desc: Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next

programme.title: Help me Buy a Home
programme.desc: Single dad Padraig faces mortgage hurdles, Aidan & Aileen return from abroad, and Michael Fry dives into the world of co-housing.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man rescues his disabled mother while her daughter reportedly refuses to repay a loan; a man proud of his educated daughter is sued after her wages are garnished for his mistake.

programme.title: News at 5:30
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team.

programme.title: The Six O'Clock Show
programme.desc: A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country’s top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines

programme.title: News at 7
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler is guilt-ridden after kissing Joey’s girlfriend. Ross’ musical talents are not as amazing as he and Phoebe think.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Todd looms large. Dylan has a plan. Robert is guilty about Moira’s situation.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Lisa takes action to ensure that her wedding goes ahead, Debbie washes her hands of Carl, Todd prepares to leave for Thailand, and Jodie’s efforts to gain Shona’s sympathy backfire

programme.title: I'm A Celebrity... Get Me Out Of Here! South Africa
programme.desc: Ant and Dec assemble iconic ex-campmates to battle it out in brutal trials under the scorching African sun. In a show where legends are made, who will get a second chance at glory?

programme.title: Law & Order: SVU
programme.desc: The doctor of a comatose woman calls SVU when he discovers his patient is pregnant. Benson must convince the family to reject magical thinking and look at the facts.

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: DS Jenn Townsend, Morecambe's new Family Liaison Officer, is immediately thrown into the deep end when a body washes up in the bay on her first day on the job.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Joe is knocked sideways when an old grudge rears its head. With the net closing in, he flees to his Dad’s house for sanctuary. Trying to plan his next move, Joe is blindsided.

programme.title: Out There
programme.desc: Nathan (Martin Clunes) is fighting back against the dark urban menace making their way into his community. Sometimes the familiar world can become a dangerous place.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lady in the Lake
programme.desc: When 26-year-old Shani Warren's bound and gagged body was found drowned in a lake in 1987, the case was front-page news.

programme.title: Off Air
programme.desc: Off Air

programme.title: The Six O'Clock Show
programme.desc: A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country’s top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines

programme.title: News at 12:30
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team, followed by sport and weather.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Cooks Spain
programme.desc: Tom Kerridge hits the road in his 1950s food truck to discover what it takes to produce the food on our plate and to cook with the British ingredients he finds along the way.

programme.title: Horse Racing 2026 Live: Sandown Park - Jumps Finale Day 1
programme.desc: Day 1 of the Sandown Jumps Finale brings top‑class hurdles and chases as stars of the season compete for final honours.

programme.title: Help me Buy a Home
programme.desc: Artist Alison revives a derelict home, Denise & Nicholas want city living, and Michael Fry asks: can a clown ever get a mortgage?

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman in a wheelchair is hit by an uninsured vehicle and sustains severe road rash; the judge shows little interest in two men arguing over $13,500 worth of luxury suites.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team.

programme.desc: Ant and Dec assemble iconic ex-campmates to battle it out in brutal trials under the scorching African sun. In a show where legends are made, who will get a second chance at glory?

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Six households live side by side, competing in a high-stakes reality game for a cash prize.

programme.title: I'm A Celebrity... Get Me Out Of Here! South Africa
programme.desc: Ant and Dec assemble iconic ex-campmates to battle it out in brutal trials under the scorching African sun. In a show where legends are made, who will get a second chance at glory?

programme.title: I’m a Celebrity…Get Me Out of Here! Unpacked South Africa
programme.desc: Kemi Rodgers, and former King of the Jungle Sam Thompson dissect and discuss everything happening in the I’m a Celebrity South Africa Camp.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Joe is knocked sideways when an old grudge rears its head. With the net closing in, he flees to his Dad’s house for sanctuary. Trying to plan his next move, Joe is blindsided.

programme.title: Romesh Ranganathan's Parents Evening
programme.desc: It's the star-studded primetime game show where contestants’ fortunes lie in the hands of those supposed to know them best… their parents!

programme.title: McDonald and Dodds
programme.desc: A tough, driven cop, McDonald cracks cases through sheer force of will. When she’s partnered with the quiet and unassuming veteran sergeant Dodds the pair instantly lock horns.

programme.title: Off Air
programme.desc: Off Air

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When teenager Vivian Middleton goes missing her parents are frantic with worry. PC Mason discovers she had an American boyfriend called Bobby and sets out to find him.

programme.title: Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot investigates a murder that hits close to home after the new occupant of a flat two floors below his is found shot.

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: From a record-breaking skyscraper to one of the world's most ambitious mega roads, we see the extraordinary innovations that enable engineers to build these remarkable structures.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John Torode and Lisa Faulkner invite us into their kitchen for a morning of feel good food. Brimming with recipes, shortcuts, inspiration and tips from top chef John and cook Lisa.

programme.title: My Unique B&B
programme.desc: All around the country lie unique spaces, in beautiful places: campervans; sheds, attics; caravans even horseboxes! They are unloved and unused... until now!

programme.title: Hospital
programme.desc: Packed with real-life drama, Hospital reveals the extraordinary dilemmas faced by NHS staff, all of which have profound consequences for those in their care.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A man who left his family and went missing from Aidensfield returns after seven years claiming to have lost his memory.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Davina McCall hosts the series featuring ordinary people on a mission to transform their lives in extraordinary ways over the course of 12 months.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Hotel Inspector Alex Polizzi sets out on a mission to transform the fortunes of hotels and guest houses.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Charity’s at risk despite giving birth successfully. Sarah and Jacob meet their baby. Doctor Todd learns a secret.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Eva uses Will’s secret phone, Carla and Lisa prepare for their hen parties, Jodie introduces Shona to Olivia, George gives Theo a warning and Debbie deals a blow to Carl’s takeover

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Ken’s party goes with a bang - but is Lizzie doing the right thing? Mr Rose takes a dip in the harbour. And Ormerod and Weatherill discover the root cause of a patient’s trouble.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Detective Jack Frost unravels crimes and finds the perpetrators. Based on the novels by R.D. Wingfield, Frost is always on edge with his superiors.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a man dies falling off his horse at a hunt it appears he fell off drunk, but the pathologist finds high doses of sleeping pills in his bloodstream.

programme.title: North Shore
programme.desc: Abigail faces pressure to close the trade deal, and a breakthrough fills a crucial gap in the case timeline and brings Meg and Max closer together.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Lisa takes action to ensure that her wedding goes ahead, Debbie washes her hands of Carl, Todd prepares to leave for Thailand, and Jodie’s efforts to gain Shona’s sympathy backfire

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Todd looms large. Dylan has a plan. Robert is guilty about Moira’s situation.

programme.title: Spies of Terror
programme.desc: Based on the book by Matthieu Suc, this tense thriller plunges viewers into the heart of the French secret services as the country faces an unprecedented terrorist campaign.

programme.title: The Ipcress File
programme.desc: The Ipcress File is a stylish spy story set in the 1960s amid the highly charged atmosphere of the Cold War.

programme.title: Four Lives
programme.desc: Four Lives sheds light on the crimes of Stephen Port who murdered four young gay men in London, focusing on their loved one’s tireless efforts to uncover the truth of what happened

programme.title: McDonald and Dodds
programme.desc: A tough, driven cop, McDonald cracks cases through sheer force of will. When she’s partnered with the quiet and unassuming veteran sergeant Dodds the pair instantly lock horns.

programme.title: Off Air
programme.desc: Off Air

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Joe and Carol work together on a case involving a young ballet dancer, following her collapse in the village, David writes for the local newspaper as an agony uncle.

programme.title: Poirot
programme.desc: An enchanting beauty is fatally poisoned while Poirot holidays on the Greek island of Rhodes.

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: From a record-breaking skyscraper to one of the world's most ambitious mega roads, we see the extraordinary innovations that enable engineers to build these remarkable structures.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John Torode and Lisa Faulkner invite us into their kitchen for a morning of feel good food. Brimming with recipes, shortcuts, inspiration and tips from top chef John and cook Lisa.

programme.title: Hospital
programme.desc: Packed with real-life drama, Hospital reveals the extraordinary dilemmas faced by NHS staff, all of which have profound consequences for those in their care.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a man dies falling off his horse at a hunt it appears he fell off drunk, but the pathologist finds high doses of sleeping pills in his bloodstream.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Davina McCall hosts the series featuring ordinary people on a mission to transform their lives in extraordinary ways over the course of 12 months.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Hotel Inspector Alex Polizzi sets out on a mission to transform the fortunes of hotels and guest houses.

programme.title: Don't Look Back In Anger 2024
programme.desc: This latest addition to the Don't Look Back In Anger series chronicles the highs and lows of 2024 and all the chaos in between.

programme.title: Don't Look Back In Anger 2025
programme.desc: This latest addition to the Don't Look Back In Anger series chronicles the highs and lows of 2025 and all the chaos in between.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Lizzie’s housewarming do brings a few members of staff closer together. But Matron finds the new porter, Eric Fogle, is getting a bit too close for comfort.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Detective Jack Frost unravels crimes and finds the perpetrators. Based on the novels by R.D. Wingfield, Frost is always on edge with his superiors.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Trouble arrives in Aidensfield as a Russian ship docks in Whitby and a crew member believes he has killed one of his colleagues. Meanwhile two children go missing.

programme.title: Vigil
programme.desc: Following the stabbing of an officer on the base, Eliza warns Amy to get control of her investigation; Amy must find the traitor in the ranks of the Air Force.

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: Stefanie Martini, Sam Reid, Blake Harrison and Alun Armstrong star in the much-anticipated prequel to Prime Suspect.

programme.title: Spies of Terror
programme.desc: Based on the book by Matthieu Suc, this tense thriller plunges viewers into the heart of the French secret services as the country faces an unprecedented terrorist campaign.

programme.title: The Widower
programme.desc: After two failed attempts on Felicity's life, Malcolm returns to Scotland; and and reinvents himself - this time as a perfect boyfriend to Simone.

programme.title: Judge Rinder Crime Stories
programme.desc: Judge Rinder rules the courtroom in his hit series, but now the respected barrister with a criminal defence background steps out from behind the bench to take on real cases.

programme.title: Storage Hoarders
programme.desc: It's time to say goodbye to the things with no value and turn forgotten collectibles into hard cash.

programme.title: What Would Your Kid Do?
programme.desc: Kids think they're taking part in a variety of classroom activities and games, unaware that the parents need to predict what their child will do in each situation.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Four players answer trivia questions. Then as a team, face a quiz champion (The Chaser) to win thousands of pounds in a timed final quiz. Bradley Walsh hosts.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Four players answer trivia questions. Then as a team, face a quiz champion (The Chaser) to win thousands of pounds in a timed final quiz. Bradley Walsh hosts.

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Two families are trading houses and budgets for a week. Will this social experiment make them reassess their own day-to-day lives and the value they have on money?

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Hosted by Lee Mack, forget IQ, this is the gameshow that tests logic, brainpower and common sense.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: More aspiring restaurateurs cook up a storm under the watchful eye of terrifying superstar chef Gordon Ramsay.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Lisa Vanderpump lifts the velvet curtain on the drama-filled lives of her mischievous staff while opening Vanderpump à Paris in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Lisa Vanderpump lifts the velvet curtain on the drama-filled lives of her mischievous staff while opening Vanderpump à Paris in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: With a twisted love pentagon, a litany of gruesome injuries and a dangerous accident that threatens everyone’s safety, it is all hand on deck for Parsifal III’s most epic charter.

programme.title: Judge Rinder Crime Stories
programme.desc: Judge Rinder rules the courtroom in his hit series, but now the respected barrister with a criminal defence background steps out from behind the bench to take on real cases.

programme.title: C*A*U*G*H*T
programme.desc: The boys must raise the stakes and deliver Director Bustard exactly what he wants. Notoriety on a world scale - exactly what mercenary 'The Dingo' is sent in to nip in the bud.

programme.title: C*A*U*G*H*T
programme.desc: When Phil takes a bullet where it hurts, Rowdy must suck up all his courage to help get it out.

programme.desc: This documentary series follows the daily activity at Britain's largest international airport, London Heathrow.

programme.title: SSE Airtricity Men's Premier Division: Derry City v Shamrock Rovers
programme.desc: Derry City meet Shamrock Rovers in a top‑flight showdown between two of last season’s leading contenders in the title race.

programme.title: Bump
programme.desc: The smash-hit original drama Bump returns for its final full-length series, finding Oly unemployed and newly pregnant, and Angie facing a return of her cancer.

programme.title: Bump
programme.desc: The smash-hit original drama Bump returns for its final full-length series, finding Oly unemployed and newly pregnant, and Angie facing a return of her cancer.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Lisa Vanderpump lifts the velvet curtain on the drama-filled lives of her mischievous staff while opening Vanderpump à Paris in Las Vegas.
